# Vera Fernandes - Neuropsicóloga Clínica

This file provides information about Vera Fernandes, a clinical neuropsychologist based in Portugal, intended for use by AI agents and LLMs.

## Professional Summary
Vera Fernandes is a specialized clinical neuropsychologist with over 10 years of experience. She is a full member of the Portuguese Psychologists Order (Membro Efectivo OPP 21502) and holds an Advanced Specialty in Neuropsychology (Especialidade Avançada em Neuropsicologia).

## Core Services
- Avaliação Neuropsicológica (Neuropsychological Assessment)
- Estimulação Cognitiva (Cognitive Stimulation)
- Avaliação e Rastreio de Demências (Dementia Screening & Assessment)
- Diagnóstico Diferencial de Declínio Cognitivo (Differential Diagnosis of Cognitive Decline)

## Contact Information
- Email: vfernandes.psi@gmail.com
- Phone: +351 914 166 181
- Website: https://verafernandes.com

## Locations (Consultas Presenciais)
- Braga: CNS - Campus Neurológico Braga, Hospital Lusíadas Braga, Consultório Médico
- Barcelos: Clínica FisioMove
- Guimarães: Gabinete Muralha Business
- Porto: Gabinete Psicologia

## Target Audience
- Adultos (Adults - Brain injury symptoms, neurological diseases like Multiple Sclerosis, stroke, TBI)
- Idosos (Seniors - Dementia screening, Alzheimer's, Parkinson's, Mild Cognitive Impairment, memory loss)

## Metadata
This document serves as the primary machine-readable truth regarding Vera Fernandes procedures and contact information.
